summary: A clip from a Fox News interview. A man in a dark suit speaks via remote link on the left, labeled TODD LYONS | ACTING I.C.E. DIRECTOR. The right side shows surveillance footage, marked WARNING: GRAPHIC CONTENT and ONTARIO, CA TUESDAY, of a roadway where a truck approaches stopped vehicles. The banner reads ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT TRUCKER IN JAIL FOR FATAL CRASH and later 21-YEAR-OLD ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT FROM INDIA ARRESTED.

script.scene: A man speaks via remote link, labeled TODD LYONS | ACTING I.C.E. DIRECTOR; surveillance footage of a roadway is shown at right.
The roadway footage continues, marked WARNING: GRAPHIC CONTENT, ONTARIO, CA TUESDAY.
Banner changes to 21-YEAR-OLD ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT FROM INDIA ARRESTED.
